data.raw: Build the first marketing landing page for our brand-new SaaS product.

ui_apply.summary: Marketing landing page scaffolded with locked microcopy

Ship faster with our SaaS platform. Deploy in minutes, not days. Start free trial.

ui_design.layout: single-column landing page, max-w-5xl, hero + 3 feature blocks

states.empty: First load with hero, features, CTA
states.loading: CTA button shows spinner while signup form submits
states.success: CTA replaced by 'Thanks — check your inbox'
states.disabled: CTA disabled while submission is in flight

microcopy.hero_title: Ship faster with our SaaS platform
microcopy.success: Thanks — check your inbox to confirm your email.

a11y.labels: hero h1 is the page title; CTA button labelled explicitly
a11y.focus: skip link to main content; CTA receives focus on success
